title: FRANCIS CENTER - 211info
text: FRANCIS CENTER FRANCIS CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a 3-day emergency food supply to individuals and families once every 30 days. Unhoused individuals may come once per week. Also offers used clothing, personal hygiene items, and blankets as available. Guests receiving food are served outside of the facility. Clothing is available inside the center for one guest at a time. Accepts food and clothing donations. 6535 SE 82nd Avenue Portland, OR 97266 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 10am-1:30pm Email (503) 775-6784 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 775-6784 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Zip codes 97206, 97215, 97216, and 97266 TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located on SE 82nd Ave one block south of SE Duke Street. On TriMet bus line 72. Services: Bedding/Linen Clothing Donation Programs Food Donation Programs Food Pantries General Clothing Provision Personal/Grooming Supplies If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. FRANCIS CENTER
